title: trigonostemon ridleyi
intro: Trigonostemon ridleyi, also known as the Malay Arrowroot, is a plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Trigonostemon ridleyi include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and acting as an antioxidant, which may contribute to its traditional use in treating various ailments. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine in certain regions of Southeast Asia.
